title: School Election 1989, National Study
description: "The 1989 school election, nationwide opinion poll" is a national opinion poll (telephone interview) carried out 28 - 30 August 1989 by the Norwegian Gallup Institute AS on behalf of the Norwegian Scientific Data Service AS (NSD) (now Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research). The questions included in the opinion poll are essentially the same as those asked to upper secondary school students in the 1989 school election survey.
